# 📰 每日智识简报（中文）
### 2026年03月19日


## 📈 金融财经

**中国OpenClaw需求推高二手MacBook价格**

中国市场对OpenClaw软件的强劲需求正在推动二手MacBook价格上涨。这种现象反映了中国科技用户对特定软件工具的偏好。价格上涨趋势可能会持续影响二手电子产品市场。

**美联储预计今年仍将降息一次尽管油价飙升**

尽管面临油价上涨压力，美联储官员表示今年仍计划降息一次。油价飙升给通胀前景带来不确定性，但央行维持相对宽松的货币政策立场。市场对降息时机和幅度存在分歧。

**欧洲央行维持利率不变警告前景极不确定**

欧洲央行决定保持利率不变，同时警告经济前景面临重大不确定性。央行官员担心地缘政治风险和能源价格波动对经济的影响。货币政策制定者采取谨慎观望态度。


## 📱 自媒体精选

**OpenAI收购Astral公司**

人工智能巨头OpenAI宣布收购Astral公司，进一步扩大其技术版图。此次收购将增强OpenAI在特定技术领域的能力和市场地位。交易细节和整合计划尚未完全公布。

**派拉蒙1100亿美元华纳兄弟豪赌**

派拉蒙公司正在进行一项价值1100亿美元的重大战略投资，涉及与华纳兄弟的业务整合。这一巨额交易被视为媒体行业的高风险投资决策。市场分析师对此次合并的成功前景持不同观点。

**隐私公司Cloaked融资3.75亿美元拓展企业市场**

专注消费者隐私保护的Cloaked公司成功融资3.75亿美元，正在向企业市场扩张。公司计划利用资金加强隐私保护技术和服务能力。企业级隐私解决方案市场需求快速增长。


## 🧠 健康·心理·美学

**43年研究发现日常咖啡可能保护大脑**

一项长达43年的研究表明，日常饮用咖啡可能对大脑健康具有保护作用。研究人员发现咖啡消费与某些神经退行性疾病风险降低相关。适量饮用咖啡可能是维护认知功能的有效方式。

**科学家将童年压力与终生消化问题联系**

最新研究表明童年期经历的压力与成年后的消化系统问题存在密切关联。早期创伤经历可能对肠道健康产生长期负面影响。研究强调了心理健康对身体健康的重要影响。

**ADHD大脑在清醒时显示类睡眠活动**

神经科学研究发现ADHD患者的大脑在清醒状态下会出现类似睡眠的神经活动模式。这一发现有助于解释ADHD患者注意力不集中和认知困难的原因。研究结果可能推动ADHD治疗方法的改进。


---
## 💡 今日洞察

**📈 投资建议**
- 关注AI收购整合机会
- 警惕央行政策不确定性
- 布局隐私保护技术股

**🧠 健康建议**
- 适量饮咖啡保护大脑
- 重视童年心理健康
- 关注ADHD睡眠质量

# 📰 Daily Intelligence Brief
### March 19, 2026


## 📈 Finance & Markets

**[OpenClaw demand in China is driving up the price of used MacBooks](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/19/openclaw-demand-in-china-is-driving-up-the-price-of-secondhand-macbooks.html)**

Strong demand for OpenClaw software in China is driving up prices of used MacBook computers. This trend reflects Chinese tech users' preference for specific software tools. The price increase may continue to impact the secondhand electronics market.

**[Fed still expects to cut rates once this year despite spiking oil prices](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/18/here-are-the-five-key-takeaways-from-this-weeks-fed-meeting.html)**

Federal Reserve officials indicate they still plan one rate cut this year despite rising oil prices. Spiking energy costs create inflation uncertainty but the central bank maintains relatively dovish stance. Markets remain divided on timing and magnitude of potential cuts.

**[European Central Bank holds rates steady, warns outlook is significantly more uncertain](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/18/dot-plot-fed-still-expects-to-cut-rates-once-this-year-despite-spiking-oil-prices-.html)**

European Central Bank keeps interest rates unchanged while warning of significantly uncertain economic outlook. Officials express concern about geopolitical risks and energy price volatility affecting growth. Monetary policymakers adopt cautious wait-and-see approach.


## 📱 Tech & Media

**[OpenAI to Acquire Astral](https://undeadly.org/cgi?action=article;sid=20260319125859)**

Artificial intelligence giant OpenAI announces acquisition of Astral company, expanding its technology portfolio. The deal will enhance OpenAI's capabilities and market position in specific tech areas. Transaction details and integration plans have not been fully disclosed.

**[Paramount's $110 billion Warner Bros. gamble](https://astral.sh/blog/openai)**

Paramount is making a massive $110 billion strategic investment involving Warner Bros. business integration. This huge deal is viewed as high-risk investment decision in media industry. Market analysts hold different views on merger success prospects.

**[Consumer-focused privacy company Cloaked raises $375M as it expands to enterprise](https://openai.com/index/openai-to-acquire-astral/)**

Consumer privacy-focused company Cloaked successfully raises $375 million while expanding into enterprise markets. The company plans to use funding to enhance privacy protection technology and service capabilities. Enterprise-level privacy solution market demand is growing rapidly.


## 🧠 Health & Wellness

**[Your daily coffee may be protecting your brain, 43-year study finds](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260318033138.htm)**

A 43-year study suggests daily coffee consumption may have protective effects on brain health. Researchers found coffee drinking associated with reduced risk of certain neurodegenerative diseases. Moderate coffee intake could be effective way to maintain cognitive function.

**[Scientists link childhood stress to lifelong digestive issues](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260317064457.htm)**

Latest research shows strong connection between childhood stress experiences and adult digestive problems. Early trauma may have long-term negative impacts on gut health. Study emphasizes important influence of mental health on physical wellbeing.

**[ADHD brains show sleep-like activity even while awake](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260317064444.htm)**

Neuroscience research finds ADHD brains exhibit sleep-like neural activity patterns while awake. This discovery helps explain attention difficulties and cognitive challenges in ADHD patients. Results may drive improvements in ADHD treatment approaches.


---
## 💡 Today's Insights

**📈 Investment**
- Focus on AI acquisition opportunities
- Watch central bank policy uncertainty
- Consider privacy technology investments

**🧠 Health & Wellness**
- Drink coffee moderately for brain health
- Prioritize childhood mental wellbeing
- Monitor ADHD sleep quality issues

**🔔 下次更新触发条件：**

## 4) 💵 Dollar & Rates Structure

- Key Level Break: Yes, breakthrough key resistance level

**US 10Y Treasury:**
- Current Yield: 4.20%
- Direction: Rising

---

## 5) 🛢️ Crude Oil & Tanker Structure

**Crude Oil Prices:**

- Dominant Driver: Geopolitics (Iran blockade of Strait of Hormuz)

**OPEC+ / Inventory Update:**

- OPEC+ Production Dynamics: "Operation Midnight Hammer" damaged Iranian infrastructure, retaliatory blockade of Strait of Hormuz

**Tanker Rates (VLCC):**

- Recent Trend: Explosive surge (94% gain Friday to Monday)

**Geopolitical Risk Impact on Oil:**

- Red Sea / Suez: Cape of Good Hope rerouting surged 112%
- Overall Risk Premium Assessment: Extremely High

---

## 6) 📊 Sector Rotation

| Sector vs Market | Today | Relative Strength |
|------------------|-------|------------------|
| ⚡ Energy vs SPY | Significantly outperform | Outperform |
| 🛡️ Defense vs SPY | Notably outperform | Outperform |

## 7) 🧭 Structure Rating & Action Bias

**Overall Rating: 🟠 Moderate Risk**

VIX broke through 19.9 key threshold, CNN Fear & Greed Index fell to 19.97 entering "Extreme Fear" territory, marking the end of 2025 AI bull market. Geopolitical conflict-driven energy supply shock combined with monetary tightening expectations creates dual pressure.

news.cn:
# 📰 每日智识简报（中文）
### 2026年03月20日


## 📈 金融财经

**美联储理事沃勒呼吁谨慎，称今年晚些时候可能降息**

美联储理事沃勒表示当前需要保持谨慎态度，暂不考虑降息。他认为今年晚些时候可能会有降息空间。这一表态反映了美联储对经济形势的审慎评估。

**铜价与金价齐跌，大宗商品普遍下跌背后有令人担忧的原因**

铜价和金价同时下跌，反映了大宗商品市场的广泛抛售。这种下跌趋势背后存在令市场担忧的深层原因。投资者需要关注全球经济增长前景的变化。

**苹果中国智能手机销量2026年初增长23%，逆行业趋势**

苹果在中国的智能手机销量在2026年初实现了23%的增长。这一表现与整体行业下滑趋势形成鲜明对比。苹果在中国市场的强劲表现显示其品牌竞争力依然强劲。


## 📱 自媒体精选

**英伟达黄仁勋在薪资基础上推广AI代币**

英伟达CEO黄仁勋提议在传统薪资体系之外引入AI代币激励机制。这一创新薪酬模式可能会改变科技行业的人才激励方式。AI代币的引入体现了数字经济时代薪酬结构的演变。

**亚马逊收购爬楼梯配送机器人制造商Rivr**

亚马逊收购了专门制造爬楼梯配送机器人的公司Rivr。这一收购将增强亚马逊的自动化配送能力，特别是在复杂建筑环境中的配送。机器人技术的应用将进一步提升物流效率。

**据报道贝索斯希望筹集1000亿美元用AI改造传统制造企业**

据报道，杰夫·贝索斯计划筹集1000亿美元资金收购传统制造企业。他的目标是利用人工智能技术对这些企业进行全面改造升级。这一计划体现了AI在传统产业数字化转型中的巨大潜力。


## 🧠 健康·心理·美学

**43年研究发现日常饮咖啡可能保护大脑健康**

一项长达43年的研究发现，日常饮用咖啡可能对大脑健康具有保护作用。这项长期研究为咖啡的神经保护效应提供了有力证据。适量饮用咖啡可能有助于维护认知功能。

**增强肌肉力量可能有助预防抑郁症，对女性尤其有效**

研究发现增强肌肉力量可能有助于预防抑郁症的发生。这种保护效应在女性群体中表现得尤为明显。力量训练不仅有益身体健康，还可能改善心理健康状况。

**被人冷落的心理影响比直接拒绝持续更久**

研究表明，被人突然冷落或无视的心理创伤比直接被拒绝的影响更持久。这种模糊的拒绝方式会给被冷落者带来更大的心理困扰。明确的沟通比回避更有利于心理健康。


---

- 关注AI与制造业融合投资机会
- 大宗商品下跌时谨慎配置

- 力量训练预防抑郁症发生
- 明确沟通胜过冷暴力回避

# 📰 Daily Intelligence Brief
### March 20, 2026


## 📈 Finance & Markets

**[Fed Governor Waller urges caution for now, says rate cuts possible later in the year](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/20/fed-gov-waller-urges-caution-for-now-cuts-possible-later-in-the-year.html)**

Fed Governor Waller advocates for a cautious approach to monetary policy in the near term. He suggests that interest rate cuts could become viable options later this year. This stance reflects the Federal Reserve's careful assessment of current economic conditions.

**[Copper joins gold in broad commodities sell-off. There's a worrying reason behind it](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/19/copper-joins-gold-in-broad-commodities-sell-off-theres-a-worrying-reason-behind-it.html)**

Copper and gold prices are falling together in a broad commodities selloff. The underlying reasons for this decline are causing significant market concern. Investors should monitor changes in global economic growth prospects.

**[Apple's China smartphone sales jump 23% to start 2026, bucking industry trend](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/19/openclaw-demand-in-china-is-driving-up-the-price-of-secondhand-macbooks.html)**

Apple's smartphone sales in China surged 23% at the beginning of 2026. This performance contrasts sharply with the broader industry decline trend. Apple's strong performance in China demonstrates its continued brand competitiveness.


## 📱 Tech & Media

**[Nvidia's Huang pitches AI tokens on top of salary](https://shkspr.mobi/blog/2026/03/im-ok-being-left-behind-thanks/)**

Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang proposes introducing AI token incentives beyond traditional salary structures. This innovative compensation model could transform talent incentive mechanisms in the tech industry. The introduction of AI tokens reflects the evolution of compensation in the digital economy era.

**[Amazon acquires Rivr, maker of a stair-climbing delivery robot](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/20/nvidia-ai-agents-tokens-human-workers-engineer-jobs-unemployment-jensen-huang.html)**

Amazon has acquired Rivr, a company specializing in stair-climbing delivery robots. This acquisition will enhance Amazon's automated delivery capabilities, especially in complex building environments. The application of robotic technology will further improve logistics efficiency.

**[Jeff Bezos reportedly wants $100 billion to buy and transform old manufacturing firms with AI](https://www.lemonde.fr/en/international/article/2026/03/20/stravaleaks-france-s-aircraft-carrier-located-in-real-time-by-le-monde-through-fitness-app_6751640_4.html)**

Jeff Bezos reportedly plans to raise $100 billion to acquire traditional manufacturing companies. His goal is to comprehensively transform and upgrade these companies using artificial intelligence technology. This plan demonstrates AI's enormous potential in traditional industry digital transformation.


## 🧠 Health & Wellness

**[Your daily coffee may be protecting your brain, 43-year study finds](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260320073819.htm)**

A 43-year study finds that daily coffee consumption may have protective effects on brain health. This long-term research provides strong evidence for coffee's neuroprotective effects. Moderate coffee consumption may help maintain cognitive function.

**[Building muscle strength may help prevent depression, especially in women](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260319044656.htm)**

Research shows that building muscle strength may help prevent depression. This protective effect is particularly pronounced in women. Strength training benefits not only physical health but may also improve mental health conditions.

**[The psychological impact of ghosting lasts longer than outright rejection](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260318033138.htm)**

Research shows that the psychological trauma of being ghosted or ignored lasts longer than direct rejection. This ambiguous form of rejection causes greater psychological distress to those being ghosted. Clear communication is more beneficial for mental health than avoidance.


---
## 💡 Today's Insights

**📈 Investment**
- Focus on AI-manufacturing integration opportunities
- Cautious commodity allocation during selloffs
- Monitor Apple's strong China performance

**🧠 Health & Wellness**
- Moderate coffee protects brain health
- Strength training prevents depression effectively
- Clear communication beats ghosting behavior

# 📰 每日智识简报（中文）
### 2026年03月21日


## 📈 金融财经

**小盘股罗素2000指数成为首个进入调整区间的美国基准指数**

罗素2000指数成为第一个进入技术性调整的美国主要股指，反映小盘股面临压力。这一走势显示投资者对小型企业前景的担忧加剧。市场分化现象明显，大盘股与小盘股表现出现显著差异。

**美联储理事沃勒呼吁谨慎，称年内晚些时候可能降息**

美联储理事沃勒建议当前应保持谨慎态度，但表示今年晚些时候可能会考虑降息。这一表态反映了美联储对经济形势的复杂判断。货币政策制定者正在平衡通胀控制与经济增长的需要。

**铜价跟随黄金大幅下跌，背后原因令人担忧**

铜价与黄金一同经历大幅抛售，显示大宗商品市场面临广泛压力。这种下跌可能反映了对全球经济增长前景的担忧。工业金属和贵金属同时下跌暗示市场情绪转向悲观。

**2月批发价格环比上涨0.7%，远超预期，同比上涨3.4%**

2月批发价格指数环比上涨0.7%，大幅超出市场预期，年化涨幅达到3.4%。这一数据显示通胀压力仍然存在，可能影响美联储货币政策决定。生产者价格的上涨最终可能传导至消费者价格。


## 📱 自媒体精选

**封锁互联网档案馆无法阻止AI发展，但会抹去网络历史记录**

封锁互联网档案馆并不能有效阻止AI技术的发展，但却会导致珍贵的网络历史资料丢失。这种做法可能对学术研究和文化保护造成不可逆转的损害。社会需要在AI发展与历史保护之间找到平衡点。

**陪审团认为马斯克在试图退出收购时误导了推特投资者**

陪审团裁定埃隆·马斯克在试图退出推特收购交易时误导了投资者。这一裁决可能对马斯克和相关公司产生重大法律和财务影响。该案例突显了企业并购中信息披露的重要性。

**新法庭文件显示五角大楼告知Anthropic双方几乎达成一致**

新的法庭文件显示，五角大楼曾告知Anthropic双方立场几乎一致。这发生在特朗普宣布关系破裂后一周。此事件反映了政府与AI公司关系的复杂性和不确定性。


## 🧠 健康·心理·美学

**43年研究发现每日饮咖啡可能保护大脑**

一项长达43年的研究发现，每日饮用咖啡可能对大脑具有保护作用。研究结果显示咖啡消费与认知功能保护之间存在关联。这为咖啡作为日常饮品的健康益处提供了科学依据。

**睡眠质量而非时长与老年人大脑功能减缓相关**

研究发现睡眠质量差而非睡眠时长与老年人日常大脑功能减缓相关。这一发现强调了睡眠质量对认知健康的重要性。改善睡眠质量可能比延长睡眠时间更有益于大脑功能。

**快乐的人寿命更长，即使在重视情绪克制的文化中**

研究显示快乐的人寿命更长，即使在重视情绪克制的文化环境中也是如此。这一发现跨越了不同文化背景，证实了积极情绪对健康的普遍益处。情绪健康对长寿的影响具有跨文化的一致性。


---
## 💡 今日洞察

**📈 投资建议**
- 关注小盘股调整后的投资机会
- 大宗商品下跌中寻找逢低买入点
- 通胀数据超预期需调整投资策略

**🧠 健康建议**
- 优先改善睡眠质量而非延长时间
- 适量饮用咖啡有助大脑保护
- 培养积极情绪有助延长寿命

# 📰 Daily Intelligence Brief
### March 21, 2026


## 📈 Finance & Markets

**[Small cap-focused Russell 2000 becomes first U.S. benchmark to enter correction territory](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/20/small-cap-russell-2000-enters-correction-territory.html)**

The Russell 2000 index becomes the first major U.S. stock benchmark to enter correction territory, reflecting pressure on small-cap stocks. This trend indicates growing investor concerns about smaller companies prospects. Market divergence is evident between large-cap and small-cap stock performance.

**[Fed Governor Waller urges caution for now, says rate cuts possible later in the year](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/20/fed-gov-waller-urges-caution-for-now-cuts-possible-later-in-the-year.html)**

Fed Governor Waller advises caution currently but suggests rate cuts may be considered later this year. This statement reflects the Federal Reserves complex assessment of economic conditions. Policymakers are balancing inflation control needs with economic growth requirements.

**[Copper joins gold in broad commodities sell-off. There's a worrying reason behind it](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/19/copper-joins-gold-in-broad-commodities-sell-off-theres-a-worrying-reason-behind-it.html)**

Copper experiences significant sell-off alongside gold, indicating broad pressure across commodity markets. This decline may reflect concerns about global economic growth prospects. Simultaneous drops in industrial and precious metals suggest shifting market sentiment toward pessimism.

**[Wholesale prices rose 0.7% in February, much more than expected and up 3.4% annually](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/19/openclaw-demand-in-china-is-driving-up-the-price-of-secondhand-macbooks.html)**

February wholesale price index rose 0.7% monthly, significantly exceeding market expectations, with annual growth reaching 3.4%. This data indicates persistent inflationary pressures that may influence Federal Reserve monetary policy decisions. Producer price increases may eventually pass through to consumer prices.


## 📱 Tech & Media

**[Blocking Internet Archive Won't Stop AI, but Will Erase Web's Historical Record](https://blog.atuin.sh/atuin-v18-13/)**

Blocking the Internet Archive wont effectively prevent AI development but will result in loss of valuable web historical records. Such actions may cause irreversible damage to academic research and cultural preservation. Society needs to find balance between AI advancement and historical conservation.

**[Elon Musk misled Twitter investors while trying to get out of acquisition, jury says](https://www.eff.org/deeplinks/2026/03/blocking-internet-archive-wont-stop-ai-it-will-erase-webs-historical-record)**

A jury determined that Elon Musk misled investors while attempting to exit the Twitter acquisition deal. This verdict may have significant legal and financial implications for Musk and related companies. The case highlights the importance of information disclosure in corporate mergers and acquisitions.

**[New court filing reveals Pentagon told Anthropic the two sides were nearly aligned — a week after Trump declared the relationship kaput](https://blogs.igalia.com/llepage/ffmpeg-101/)**

New court filings reveal the Pentagon informed Anthropic that both sides were nearly aligned. This occurred one week after Trump declared the relationship was over. The incident reflects the complexity and uncertainty in government-AI company relationships.


## 🧠 Health & Wellness

**[Your daily coffee may be protecting your brain, 43-year study finds](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260320073819.htm)**

A 43-year study finds that daily coffee consumption may provide brain protection. Research results show an association between coffee consumption and cognitive function preservation. This provides scientific evidence for the health benefits of coffee as a daily beverage.

**[Poor sleep quality, not duration, linked to slower daily brain function in older adults](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260319044656.htm)**

Research finds poor sleep quality, not duration, is linked to slower daily brain function in older adults. This finding emphasizes the importance of sleep quality for cognitive health. Improving sleep quality may be more beneficial for brain function than extending sleep duration.

**[Happier people live longer, even in cultures that value emotional restraint](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260318033138.htm)**

Research shows happier people live longer, even in cultures that value emotional restraint. This finding transcends different cultural backgrounds, confirming universal benefits of positive emotions on health. The impact of emotional well-being on longevity shows cross-cultural consistency.


---
## 💡 Today's Insights

**📈 Investment**
- Monitor small-cap opportunities after correction
- Seek commodity buying opportunities during selloff
- Adjust strategy for higher inflation expectations

**🧠 Health & Wellness**
- Prioritize sleep quality over duration improvement
- Moderate coffee consumption aids brain protection
- Cultivate positive emotions for longevity benefits

# 📰 每日智识简报（中文）
### 2026年03月22日


## 📈 金融财经

**美国证监会委员皮尔斯谈ETF：我们希望与各方合作开发新产品**

美国证监会委员皮尔斯表示监管机构愿意与市场参与者合作开发新的ETF产品。这一表态显示监管态度趋于开放，可能为创新金融产品铺平道路。ETF市场预计将迎来更多元化的投资选择。

**小盘股为主的罗素2000指数成为首个进入调整区间的美国基准指数**

罗素2000指数率先进入技术性调整，跌幅超过10%。小盘股表现疲弱反映投资者风险偏好下降，资金向大盘股集中。这可能预示着市场整体调整的开始。

**美联储理事沃勒呼吁当前保持谨慎，称年内稍后可能降息**

美联储理事沃勒建议目前货币政策保持谨慎态度，但不排除年内降息可能。这一表态为市场提供了降息预期的时间框架。投资者需关注经济数据变化对降息时机的影响。

**铜价与黄金一同下跌，大宗商品普遍抛售背后存在令人担忧的原因**

铜价与黄金同步下跌，反映大宗商品市场普遍承压。这一趋势可能预示着全球经济增长放缓的担忧。投资者需警惕商品价格下跌对相关行业的冲击。


## 📱 自媒体精选

**独家探访亚马逊Trainium实验室：这款芯片赢得了Anthropic、OpenAI甚至苹果的青睐**

亚马逊Trainium芯片在AI训练领域获得主要科技公司认可。该芯片技术突破可能重塑AI计算市场格局。亚马逊在云计算和AI基础设施领域的竞争优势进一步增强。

**AI代币是新的签约奖金还是仅仅是商业成本**

科技公司开始使用AI代币作为员工激励工具，类似传统股票期权。这一趋势反映了AI行业人才竞争的激烈程度。代币激励模式可能成为科技行业新的薪酬标准。

**距离第一条推特发布已过去20年**

推特诞生20周年标志着社交媒体时代的重要里程碑。这一平台深刻改变了信息传播和社会交流方式。回顾展现了数字社交平台对现代社会的巨大影响。


## 🧠 健康·心理·美学

**减肥药Ozempic可降低抑郁、焦虑和成瘾风险**

研究发现Ozempic除减肥功效外，还能显著降低抑郁、焦虑和成瘾风险。这一发现扩展了该药物的治疗应用范围。精神健康治疗可能迎来新的药物选择。

**大规模研究发现大麻对焦虑、抑郁或PTSD无治疗效果**

大规模研究表明大麻对焦虑、抑郁和PTSD没有治疗效果。这一结果挑战了大麻医疗用途的普遍认知。患者应寻求循证医学支持的治疗方案。

**43年研究发现日常饮用咖啡可能保护大脑健康**

长达43年的研究证实日常咖啡消费对大脑健康有保护作用。适量饮用咖啡可能降低认知衰退风险。这为咖啡的健康益处提供了长期科学证据。

**实验室培养的大脑模型揭示不同类型自闭症的独特电活动模式**

科学家利用实验室培养的大脑模型发现不同自闭症类型具有独特的电活动模式。这一发现有助于个性化诊断和治疗方案的开发。自闭症研究进入精准医学新阶段。


---
## 💡 今日洞察

**📈 投资建议**
- 关注小盘股调整机会，布局优质标的
- 重点配置AI芯片和云计算相关股票
- 谨慎对待大宗商品，等待政策明朗

**🧠 健康建议**
- 适量饮用咖啡有益大脑长期健康
- 选择循证医学支持的心理治疗方案
- 关注新药物在精神健康的应用前景

# 📰 Daily Intelligence Brief
### March 22, 2026


## 📈 Finance & Markets

**[SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce on ETFs: We want to work with people on new products](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/21/crypto-tokenization-and-etfs-secs-peirce-indicates-openness.html)**

SEC Commissioner Peirce signals regulatory openness to collaborate on new ETF product development. This stance suggests a more accommodating regulatory environment for financial innovation. The ETF market may see expanded investment options and product diversity.

**[Small cap-focused Russell 2000 becomes first U.S. benchmark to enter correction territory](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/20/small-cap-russell-2000-enters-correction-territory.html)**

Russell 2000 index leads major benchmarks into correction territory with over 10% decline. Small-cap weakness reflects declining risk appetite and capital flight to large-caps. This may signal broader market adjustment beginning.

**[Fed Governor Waller urges caution for now, says rate cuts possible later in the year](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/20/fed-gov-waller-urges-caution-for-now-cuts-possible-later-in-the-year.html)**

Fed Governor Waller advocates current monetary caution while keeping door open for rate cuts. This provides markets with a timeline framework for potential easing. Economic data developments will be crucial for cut timing.

**[Copper joins gold in broad commodities sell-off. Theres a worrying reason behind it](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/19/copper-joins-gold-in-broad-commodities-sell-off-theres-a-worrying-reason-behind-it.html)**

Copper and gold decline together signals broad commodity market stress. This trend may reflect growing concerns about global economic growth slowdown. Investors should monitor impacts on commodity-dependent sectors and economies.


## 📱 Tech & Media

**[An exclusive tour of Amazons Trainium lab, the chip thats won over Anthropic, OpenAI, even Apple](https://shkspr.mobi/blog/2026/03/bored-of-eating-your-own-dogfood-try-smelling-your-own-farts/)**

Amazon Trainium chips gain adoption from major AI companies including OpenAI and Apple. This breakthrough technology could reshape the AI computing market landscape. Amazon strengthens its competitive position in cloud and AI infrastructure.

**[Are AI tokens the new signing bonus or just a cost of doing business](https://emi-h.com/articles/a-case-against-currying.html)**

Tech companies explore AI tokens as employee incentives similar to stock options. This reflects intense talent competition in the AI industry. Token-based compensation may become new standard in tech sector.

**[Its been 20 years since the first tweet](https://blog.alaindichiappari.dev/p/convincing-is-not-persuading)**

Twitters 20th anniversary marks major social media milestone and transformation. The platform fundamentally changed information sharing and social communication patterns. This reflects digital platforms profound impact on modern society.


## 🧠 Health & Wellness

**[Weight loss drug Ozempic cuts depression, anxiety, and addiction risk](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260322020250.htm)**

Research shows Ozempic reduces depression, anxiety and addiction risks beyond weight loss. This expands the drugs therapeutic applications significantly. Mental health treatment may gain new pharmaceutical options.

**[Huge study finds no evidence cannabis helps anxiety, depression, or PTSD](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260320073819.htm)**

Large-scale study challenges cannabis therapeutic benefits for mental health conditions. This finding questions widespread beliefs about marijuana medical applications. Patients should seek evidence-based treatment alternatives.

**[Your daily coffee may be protecting your brain, 43-year study finds](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260319044656.htm)**

43-year longitudinal study confirms coffee consumption protects brain health. Moderate coffee intake may reduce cognitive decline risks significantly. This provides strong long-term evidence for coffees health benefits.

**[Lab-grown brain models reveal unique electrical patterns in different types of autism](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260318033138.htm)**

Lab-grown brain models identify distinct electrical patterns across autism types. This breakthrough enables personalized diagnosis and treatment development. Autism research enters precision medicine era with targeted approaches.


---
## 💡 Today's Insights

**📈 Investment**
- Consider small-cap opportunities during correction phase
- Focus on AI chip and cloud infrastructure
- Exercise caution with commodities amid uncertainty

**🧠 Health & Wellness**
- Moderate coffee intake supports long-term brain health
- Choose evidence-based mental health treatment options
- Monitor new drug applications for mental wellness

来自苹果和礼来制药等美国公司的高管在中国发展论坛上重新制定进入中国市场的策略。他们正在调整方法以适应世界第二大经济体的市场环境。这显示了美国企业对中国市场的持续重视。

**美联储古尔斯比在紧张环境下对通胀表示担忧**

芝加哥联储主席古尔斯比对当前复杂经济环境下的通胀问题表示担忧。他形容当前的经济气候既紧张又激烈。这反映了美联储官员对通胀压力的持续关注。

**美联储决定后交易员认为今年降息可能性很小**

在美联储最新政策决定后，交易员们认为今年降息的可能性微乎其微。市场预期显示利率将在当前水平保持更长时间。这反映了对经济和通胀状况的谨慎评估。

**高盛因史上最大供应冲击上调石油预测**

高盛投资银行上调了石油价格预测，原因是市场面临史上最大规模的供应冲击。这一供应中断可能对全球能源市场产生重大影响。投资者需要关注能源板块的投资机会。


## 📱 自媒体精选

**美国车载酒精检测仪公司遭网络攻击致司机受困**

一家车载酒精检测设备公司遭受网络攻击，导致美国多地司机被困无法启动车辆。这次攻击暴露了智能设备在关键基础设施中的安全漏洞。事件凸显了网络安全对日常生活的重要影响。

**线上课程消除了外貌对学生成绩的影响**

研究发现随着课程转向线上进行，外貌出众的学生不再享有成绩优势。这种变化表明传统课堂中存在基于外貌的偏见。线上教育可能提供了更加公平的学习环境。

**马斯克公布SpaceX和特斯拉的芯片制造计划**

埃隆·马斯克宣布了为SpaceX和特斯拉建立芯片制造能力的计划。这一举措旨在减少对外部供应商的依赖并提高技术自主性。该计划可能重塑汽车和航空航天行业的供应链格局。


## 🧠 健康·心理·美学

**科学家发现阿尔茨海默病大脑中的隐藏死亡开关**

科学家在大脑中发现了与阿尔茨海默病相关的隐藏死亡开关机制。这一发现可能为治疗神经退行性疾病提供新的靶点。研究为开发更有效的阿尔茨海默病治疗方法带来希望。

**减肥药奥司匹克可降低抑郁、焦虑和成瘾风险**

研究显示减肥药奥司匹克不仅有助于减重，还能显著降低抑郁症、焦虑症和成瘾的风险。这种药物的多重健康益处超出了原本的预期。发现为心理健康治疗开辟了新的可能性。

**科学家发现高血压背后令人惊讶的大脑触发因素**

研究人员发现了导致高血压的意外大脑触发机制。这一发现挑战了传统对高血压成因的理解。新发现可能为血压管理和心血管疾病预防提供创新治疗途径。

**研究将裸盖菇素受体激活与大脑结构持续变化联系**

新研究发现裸盖菇素受体的激活会导致大脑结构发生持续性变化。这些结构改变可能解释了迷幻药物的长期治疗效果。研究为精神健康治疗的新方法提供了科学依据。


---
## 💡 今日洞察

**📈 投资建议**
- 关注能源板块供应冲击机会
- 避免市场择时采用长期策略
- 重视中美企业合作投资机会

**🧠 健康建议**
- 重视新型减肥药多重健康益处
- 关注大脑机制对疾病的影响
- 探索心理健康治疗创新方法
news.en:
# 📰 Daily Intelligence Brief
### March 23, 2026


## 📈 Finance & Markets

**[BlackRock's Larry Fink warns against market timing, says missing best days can halve returns](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/23/blackrocks-larry-fink-warns-against-trying-to-time-the-market-.html)**

BlackRock CEO Larry Fink warns investors against trying to time the market. He notes that missing the best performing trading days could cut investment returns in half. This emphasizes the importance of long-term holding strategies.

**[U.S. executives revamp their push into China at the China Development Forum](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/23/apple-eli-lilly-us-china-market-push-trade-truce.html)**

Executives from US companies like Apple and Eli Lilly are revamping their strategies for entering the Chinese market at the China Development Forum. They are adjusting their approaches to fit the world's second-largest economy. This shows continued US corporate interest in the Chinese market.

**[Fed's Goolsbee expresses worry about inflation in fraught climate](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/23/feds-goolsbee-says-hes-worried-about-inflation-in-fraught-but-intense-climate.html)**

Chicago Fed President Goolsbee expresses concern about inflation in the current complex economic environment. He describes the current economic climate as both tense and intense. This reflects ongoing Fed official concerns about inflationary pressures.

**[Traders see little chance of interest rate cut this year following Fed decision](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/21/crypto-tokenization-and-etfs-secs-peirce-indicates-openness.html)**

Following the Fed's latest policy decision, traders believe there is very little chance of interest rate cuts this year. Market expectations show rates will remain at current levels for longer. This reflects cautious assessment of economic and inflation conditions.

**[Goldman raises oil forecasts on largest-ever supply shock](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/20/elizabeth-warren-demands-answers-on-costs-economic-impact-of-illegal-and-reckless-war.html)**

Goldman Sachs investment bank has raised oil price forecasts due to the market facing the largest supply shock in history. This supply disruption could have major impacts on global energy markets. Investors should watch for opportunities in the energy sector.


## 📱 Tech & Media

**[Cyberattack on vehicle breathalyzer company leaves drivers stranded in the US](https://techcrunch.com/2026/03/20/cyberattack-on-vehicle-breathalyzer-company-leaves-drivers-stranded-across-the-us/)**

A vehicle breathalyzer equipment company suffered a cyberattack, leaving drivers stranded across the US unable to start their vehicles. The attack exposed security vulnerabilities in smart devices within critical infrastructure. The incident highlights cybersecurity's important impact on daily life.

**[Attractive students no longer receive better results as classes moved online](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S016517652200283X)**

Research finds that as classes moved online, attractive students no longer enjoy grade advantages. This change indicates appearance-based bias existed in traditional classrooms. Online education may provide a more equitable learning environment.

**[Elon Musk unveils chip manufacturing plans for SpaceX and Tesla](https://avherald.com/h?article=536bb98e)**

Elon Musk announced plans to build chip manufacturing capabilities for SpaceX and Tesla. This move aims to reduce dependence on external suppliers and increase technological autonomy. The plan could reshape supply chain dynamics in automotive and aerospace industries.


## 🧠 Health & Wellness

**[Scientists discover Alzheimer's hidden death switch in the brain](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260323005526.htm)**

Scientists discovered a hidden death switch mechanism in the brain related to Alzheimer's disease. This finding could provide new targets for treating neurodegenerative diseases. The research brings hope for developing more effective Alzheimer's treatments.

**[Weight loss drug Ozempic cuts depression, anxiety, and addiction risk](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260322020302.htm)**

Research shows weight loss drug Ozempic not only helps with weight loss but also significantly reduces risk of depression, anxiety, and addiction. The drug's multiple health benefits exceed original expectations. The discovery opens new possibilities for mental health treatment.

**[Scientists discover surprising brain trigger behind high blood pressure](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260322020250.htm)**

Researchers discovered an unexpected brain trigger mechanism causing high blood pressure. This finding challenges traditional understanding of hypertension causes. The new discovery may provide innovative treatment pathways for blood pressure management and cardiovascular disease prevention.

**[Study links psilocybin receptor activation to sustained structural brain changes](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260320073819.htm)**

New research finds that psilocybin receptor activation leads to sustained structural brain changes. These structural changes may explain the long-term therapeutic effects of psychedelic substances. The study provides scientific basis for new approaches to mental health treatment.


---
## 💡 Today's Insights

**📈 Investment**
- Focus energy sector supply shock opportunities
- Avoid market timing use long-term strategies
- Value US-China corporate cooperation investment opportunities

**🧠 Health & Wellness**
- Value new weight loss drugs multiple health benefits
- Focus brain mechanisms impact on disease development
- Explore innovative mental health treatment approaches

# 📰 每日智识简报（中文）
### 2026年03月24日


## 📈 金融财经

**穆迪因不良贷款增长将KKR及Future Standard私募信贷基金评级下调至垃圾级**

穆迪评级机构将KKR和Future Standard管理的私募信贷基金评级下调至垃圾级别。这一降级主要由于该基金不良贷款数量显著增长。此举反映出私募信贷市场面临的信用风险正在上升。

**阿波罗仅向投资者返还150亿美元私募信贷基金45%的赎回申请**

阿波罗全球管理公司仅能满足投资者从其150亿美元私募信贷基金中45%的赎回要求。这表明该基金面临流动性紧张问题。投资者无法及时收回全部投资资金，显示私募信贷市场的压力。

**贝莱德CEO芬克警告不要择时交易称错过最佳交易日可使收益减半**

贝莱德首席执行官拉里·芬克警告投资者避免进行市场择时交易。他指出错过市场表现最佳的交易日可能导致投资收益减少一半。芬克强调长期投资策略的重要性。

**特斯拉欧洲销量终于增长股价上涨**

特斯拉在欧洲市场的销量终于出现增长趋势。这一积极消息推动了特斯拉股价的上涨。欧洲市场的复苏为特斯拉全球业务带来了新的动力。


## 📱 自媒体精选

**TikTok广告即将变得更具干扰性**

TikTok平台即将推出更具干扰性的广告格式。这些新广告形式可能会更多地打断用户的浏览体验。此举旨在提高广告效果但可能影响用户满意度。

**Mirage融资7500万美元继续为其AI视频编辑应用Captions构建模型**

Mirage公司成功融资7500万美元用于继续开发其AI视频编辑应用Captions的模型。该应用专注于利用人工智能技术简化视频编辑流程。这笔资金将帮助公司进一步完善其AI技术。

**Spotify新推出的SongDNA功能展示你喜爱歌曲之间的关联**

Spotify推出了名为SongDNA的新功能，可以展示用户喜爱歌曲之间的关联性。该功能通过分析音乐特征来绘制歌曲间的连接图谱。这为用户提供了更深入了解自己音乐品味的方式。


## 🧠 健康·心理·美学

**科学家发现阿尔茨海默病大脑中隐藏的死亡开关**

科学家们发现了阿尔茨海默病患者大脑中一个隐藏的死亡开关机制。这一发现可能为理解疾病进程提供新的视角。研究结果有助于开发针对性的治疗方案。

**减肥药Ozempic可降低抑郁焦虑和成瘾风险**

研究发现减肥药物Ozempic除了减重效果外，还能降低抑郁症、焦虑症和成瘾行为的风险。这种药物显示出了超越减重的多重健康益处。这一发现可能改变对该药物应用范围的认知。

**月经激素可能加重服药女性的ADHD症状**

研究显示月经期激素变化可能会加重正在服用药物治疗的女性ADHD患者的症状。激素波动对ADHD药物效果产生影响。这提醒医生需要考虑女性患者的生理周期因素。

**闭眼提高听力可能是个大错误**

新研究表明闭上眼睛来提高听力可能并不是最佳选择。传统认为闭眼有助于集中注意力听声音的观点受到质疑。研究建议保持眼睛睁开可能对听觉处理更有益。


---
## 💡 今日洞察

**📈 投资建议**
- 私募信贷风险上升需谨慎投资
- 避免市场择时坚持长期投资
- 关注AI视频编辑领域投资机会

**🧠 健康建议**
- 重视女性ADHD治疗中激素影响
- Ozempic显示多重健康益处
- 保持眼睛睁开有助听觉处理

# 📰 Daily Intelligence Brief
### March 24, 2026


## 📈 Finance & Markets

**[Moodys cuts rating on private credit fund run by KKR and Future Standard to junk as bad loans grow](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/24/moodys-private-credit-fund-kkr-future-standard-junk.html)**

Moodys rating agency downgraded a private credit fund managed by KKR and Future Standard to junk status. The downgrade was primarily driven by a significant increase in bad loans within the fund. This move reflects rising credit risks in the private credit market.

**[Apollo gives investors only 45% of requested withdrawals from $15 billion private credit fund](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/23/apollo-private-credit-fund-gives-investors-only-45percent-of-requested-withdrawals.html)**

Apollo Global Management could only fulfill 45% of investor withdrawal requests from its $15 billion private credit fund. This indicates the fund is facing liquidity constraints. Investors cannot retrieve their full investment amounts promptly, showing stress in private credit markets.

**[BlackRocks Larry Fink warns against market timing, says missing best days can halve returns](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/23/volume-in-stock-and-oil-futures-surged-minutes-before-trumps-market-turning-post.html)**

BlackRock CEO Larry Fink warned investors against attempting to time the market. He noted that missing the markets best performing days could reduce investment returns by half. Fink emphasized the importance of long-term investment strategies.

**[Tesla's European Sales Finally Increase. The Stock Rises.](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/23/blackrocks-larry-fink-warns-against-trying-to-time-the-market-.html)**

Tesla finally showed sales growth in the European market. This positive news drove Tesla stock prices higher. The European market recovery provided new momentum for Teslas global business.


## 📱 Tech & Media

**[TikTok ads are about to get a tad more disruptive](https://smu160.github.io/posts/missile-defense-is-np-complete/)**

TikTok platform is set to introduce more disruptive advertising formats. These new ad formats may interrupt user browsing experiences more frequently. This move aims to improve ad effectiveness but could impact user satisfaction.

**[Mirage raises $75M to continue building models for its AI video editing app Captions](https://nanoclaw.dev/blog/nanoclaw-agent-vault/)**

Mirage successfully raised $75 million to continue developing models for its AI video editing app Captions. The app focuses on using artificial intelligence to simplify video editing processes. This funding will help the company further refine its AI technology.

**[Spotify's new SongDNA feature maps how your favorite songs are connected](https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/issues/24512)**

Spotify launched a new feature called SongDNA that shows connections between users favorite songs. The feature analyzes musical characteristics to map relationships between tracks. This provides users with deeper insights into their musical preferences.


## 🧠 Health & Wellness

**[Scientists discover Alzheimers hidden death switch in the brain](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260323005526.htm)**

Scientists discovered a hidden death switch mechanism in the brains of Alzheimers patients. This finding could provide new perspectives on understanding disease progression. The research results may help develop targeted treatment approaches.

**[Weight loss drug Ozempic cuts depression, anxiety, and addiction risk](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260322020302.htm)**

Research found that weight loss drug Ozempic reduces risks of depression, anxiety, and addiction beyond weight loss effects. The medication shows multiple health benefits beyond weight reduction. This discovery could change perceptions of the drugs application scope.

**[Menstrual hormones may worsen ADHD symptoms in medicated women](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260322020250.htm)**

Research shows menstrual hormone changes may worsen ADHD symptoms in women taking medication. Hormonal fluctuations affect ADHD medication effectiveness. This reminds doctors to consider female patients physiological cycle factors.

**[Closing your eyes to hear better might be a big mistake](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260320073819.htm)**

New research suggests closing eyes to improve hearing might not be the best choice. The traditional view that closing eyes helps focus on sounds is questioned. Studies suggest keeping eyes open may benefit auditory processing more.


---
## 💡 Today's Insights

**📈 Investment**
- Private credit risks rising require cautious investment
- Avoid market timing maintain long term strategy
- Focus on AI video editing investment opportunities

**🧠 Health & Wellness**
- Consider hormonal effects in female ADHD treatment
- Ozempic shows multiple health benefits beyond weight
- Keep eyes open for better auditory processing

# 📰 每日智识简报（中文）
### 2026年03月25日


## 📈 金融财经

**前SEC主席克莱顿称监管机构将审查特朗普任职前的交易**

前美国证券交易委员会主席杰伊·克莱顿表示，监管机构将严格审查特朗普上任前的相关交易活动。这一表态凸显了对政治敏感时期市场操作的监管关注。此举可能对相关金融机构和投资者产生重要影响。

**道达尔能源CEO称全球从未经历过如此飙升的炼油利润率**

道达尔能源首席执行官在接受CNBC采访时表示，当前全球炼油利润率达到前所未有的高度。这种异常高的利润率反映了全球能源市场的紧张状况。能源公司正从这种市场环境中获得巨额收益。

**经济表面下显现裂痕，华尔街衰退概率攀升**

华尔街分析师认为经济衰退的可能性正在上升，因为经济基本面出现了一些隐忧。尽管表面数据看起来稳定，但深层次的经济指标显示出疲软迹象。投资者开始为可能的经济下行做准备。

**穆迪因不良贷款增长将KKR和Future Standard私募信贷基金评级降至垃圾级**

评级机构穆迪将KKR和Future Standard管理的私募信贷基金评级下调至垃圾级。此次降级主要因为该基金不良贷款数量显著增加。这反映了私募信贷市场面临的风险上升。


## 📱 自媒体精选

**Meta计划裁员，OpenAI关闭Sora视频平台**

社交媒体巨头Meta宣布新一轮裁员计划，以优化运营成本。同时，人工智能公司OpenAI决定关闭其Sora视频生成平台。这些举措反映了科技行业在当前经济环境下的调整策略。

**索尼和本田放弃合作电动车项目**

日本科技巨头索尼和汽车制造商本田宣布终止其联合电动车开发项目。两家公司在项目推进过程中遇到了技术和市场方面的挑战。这一决定反映了电动车行业竞争的激烈程度。

**新研究表明真相相比虚假信息具有天然竞争优势**

最新科学研究发现，在信息传播过程中真相具有相对于虚假信息的自然优势。研究结果显示人们在长期接触中更倾向于相信和传播真实信息。这一发现对社交媒体和信息治理具有重要意义。


## 🧠 健康·心理·美学

**二甲双胍60年后揭示隐藏的大脑通路机制**

科学家在二甲双胍使用60年后首次发现了其影响大脑功能的隐藏机制。研究揭示了这种糖尿病药物如何通过特定神经通路发挥作用。这一发现可能为治疗神经系统疾病开辟新途径。

**为什么随着年龄增长大脑可能破坏你的平衡能力**

新研究解释了为什么随着年龄增长，大脑处理平衡信息的能力会下降。科学家发现老化过程中神经连接的变化是导致平衡问题的关键因素。了解这一机制有助于开发针对性的预防和治疗方法。

**父亲在婴儿出生一年后面临抑郁风险上升**

最新研究发现，父亲在孩子出生后一年内患抑郁症的风险显著增加。这种现象往往被忽视，但对家庭整体健康产生重要影响。研究强调了关注父亲心理健康的重要性。


---
## 💡 今日洞察

**📈 投资建议**
- 关注能源炼油股投资机会
- 警惕私募信贷基金风险
- 准备经济衰退防御性配置

**🧠 健康建议**
- 重视父亲产后心理健康
- 加强老年平衡训练预防
- 关注二甲双胍神经保护作用

# 📰 Daily Intelligence Brief
### March 25, 2026


## 📈 Finance & Markets

**[Former SEC chair Jay Clayton says regulators would scrutinize trading ahead of Trump post](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/25/former-sec-chair-jay-clayton-says-regulators-would-scrutinize-trading-ahead-of-trump-post.html)**

Former SEC Chairman Jay Clayton stated that regulators will closely examine trading activities related to Trump before he takes office. This statement highlights regulatory concerns about market operations during politically sensitive periods. The move could significantly impact relevant financial institutions and investors.

**[World has never experienced soaring refining margins like this, TotalEnergies CEO tells CNBC](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/24/totalenergies-ceo-world-has-never-experienced-refining-margins-like-this-.html)**

TotalEnergies CEO told CNBC that global refining margins have reached unprecedented highs. These exceptional profit margins reflect tensions in the global energy market. Energy companies are reaping substantial profits from this market environment.

**[Recession odds climb on Wall Street as economy shows cracks beneath the surface](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/24/jamie-dimon-iran-war-middle-east-peace-prospects-long-term.html)**

Wall Street analysts believe recession odds are rising as economic fundamentals show underlying concerns. Despite stable surface data, deeper economic indicators reveal signs of weakness. Investors are beginning to prepare for potential economic downturn.

**[Moody's cuts rating on private credit fund run by KKR and Future Standard to junk as bad loans grow](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/24/moodys-private-credit-fund-kkr-future-standard-junk.html)**

Moody's downgraded the private credit fund managed by KKR and Future Standard to junk status. The downgrade was primarily due to a significant increase in bad loans within the fund. This reflects rising risks in the private credit market.


## 📱 Tech & Media

**[Meta plans layoffs, OpenAI shuts down Sora video platform](https://ente.com/blog/ensu/)**

Social media giant Meta announced a new round of layoffs to optimize operational costs. Meanwhile, AI company OpenAI decided to shut down its Sora video generation platform. These moves reflect tech industry adjustment strategies in the current economic environment.

**[Sony and Honda give up on their joint EV project](https://www.theregister.com/2026/03/25/open_source_bill_opinion/)**

Japanese tech giant Sony and automaker Honda announced the termination of their joint electric vehicle development project. Both companies encountered technical and market challenges during project implementation. This decision reflects the intense competition in the EV industry.

**[New research suggests truth has a natural competitive edge over misinformation](https://github.com/ivan-magda/swift-claude-code)**

Latest scientific research found that truth has natural advantages over misinformation in information dissemination. Results show people tend to believe and share truthful information in long-term exposure. This finding has important implications for social media and information governance.


## 🧠 Health & Wellness

**[Metformin's hidden brain pathway revealed after 60 years](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260325055441.htm)**

Scientists discovered metformin's hidden brain mechanism 60 years after its first use. Research revealed how this diabetes medication works through specific neural pathways. This discovery may open new avenues for treating neurological diseases.

**[Why your brain may be sabotaging your balance as you age](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260324230102.htm)**

New research explains why the brain's ability to process balance information declines with age. Scientists found that changes in neural connections during aging are key factors causing balance issues. Understanding this mechanism helps develop targeted prevention and treatment methods.

**[Fathers face rising depression risk a year after baby arrives](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260324230057.htm)**

Latest research found that fathers face significantly increased depression risk within a year after childbirth. This phenomenon is often overlooked but has important impacts on overall family health. Research emphasizes the importance of focusing on fathers' mental health.


---
## 💡 Today's Insights

**📈 Investment**
- Focus on energy refining stock opportunities
- Beware private credit fund risks
- Prepare defensive recession portfolio allocation

**🧠 Health & Wellness**
- Address fathers postpartum mental health
- Strengthen elderly balance training prevention
- Consider metformin neuroprotective benefits

# 📰 每日智识简报（中文）
### 2026年03月26日


## 📈 金融财经

**震动股市的AI研究报告公司发布新重大预测**

一家研究公司此前发布的AI论文对整个股市造成了重大冲击。该公司现在又发布了另一个重要预测。这可能会再次影响市场走势和投资者情绪。

**全球预测机构预计美国今年通胀率4.2%远超美联储估计**

全球经济预测机构预测美国今年通胀率将达到4.2%。这一预测远高于美联储的官方估计数据。通胀压力可能对美国经济政策和市场表现产生重大影响。

**经济表面下显现裂痕华尔街衰退概率攀升**

华尔街分析师认为经济衰退的可能性正在上升。经济数据显示表面繁荣之下存在结构性问题。这些潜在的经济裂痕引起了投资者和政策制定者的关注。


## 📱 自媒体精选

**欧洲议会决定终止聊天控制1.0法案**

欧洲议会投票决定停止实施聊天控制1.0监管措施。这项决定结束了对数字通信大规模监控的争议政策。此举被视为保护公民数字隐私权的重要胜利。

**洛杉矶陪审团裁决Instagram和YouTube故意设计成瘾儿童**

洛杉矶法院陪审团作出里程碑式裁决认定社交媒体平台故意设计让儿童上瘾。这一判决可能对社交媒体行业产生深远影响。平台可能面临更严格的监管和法律责任。

**重大黑客工具泄露网上数百万iPhone面临风险**

一个主要的黑客攻击工具在网上泄露威胁数百万iPhone用户安全。这次泄露可能导致大规模网络安全事件。苹果用户需要立即采取防护措施保护设备安全。


## 🧠 健康·心理·美学

**生动梦境可能是深度安眠的秘密**

科学研究发现生动的梦境可能有助于获得更深层和更充分的睡眠。梦境活动与睡眠质量之间存在重要关联。这一发现可能改变我们对睡眠和梦境关系的理解。

**高肉类摄入可能保护特定阿尔茨海默基因携带者认知功能**

研究发现携带特定阿尔茨海默病基因的人群中高肉类摄入可能有助于保护认知功能。这一发现挑战了传统的饮食建议。基因型可能影响最适合的饮食策略选择。

**抑郁症与真正悲观偏见相关而非现实世界观**

研究表明抑郁症患者表现出的是真正的悲观偏见而不是对世界的现实认知。这一发现澄清了关于抑郁症认知模式的争议。理解这种偏见有助于改善抑郁症治疗方法。


---
## 💡 今日洞察

**📈 投资建议**
- 关注AI相关股票波动和投资机会
- 警惕通胀压力下的资产配置调整
- 考虑经济衰退风险的防御性投资

**🧠 健康建议**
- 重视梦境质量改善睡眠健康
- 根据基因型调整个性化饮食策略
- 识别并纠正抑郁相关认知偏见

# 📰 Daily Intelligence Brief
### March 26, 2026


## 📈 Finance & Markets

A research firm previously published an AI paper that significantly impacted the entire stock market. The company has now released another major prediction. This could potentially influence market trends and investor sentiment once again.

**[Global forecasting group sees U.S. inflation at 4.2% this year, much higher than Fed estimate](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/25/former-sec-chair-jay-clayton-says-regulators-would-scrutinize-trading-ahead-of-trump-post.html)**

Global economic forecasting groups predict US inflation will reach 4.2% this year. This forecast is significantly higher than the Federal Reserve's official estimates. Inflationary pressures could have major impacts on US economic policy and market performance.

**[Recession odds climb on Wall Street as economy shows cracks beneath the surface](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/24/totalenergies-ceo-world-has-never-experienced-refining-margins-like-this-.html)**

Wall Street analysts believe the probability of economic recession is increasing. Economic data shows structural problems beneath surface prosperity. These underlying economic cracks are raising concerns among investors and policymakers.


## 📱 Tech & Media

**[European Parliament decided that Chat Control 1.0 must stop](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47530391)**

The European Parliament voted to stop implementing Chat Control 1.0 regulatory measures. This decision ends the controversial policy of mass surveillance of digital communications. This move is seen as an important victory for protecting citizens digital privacy rights.

**[Landmark L.A. jury verdict finds Instagram, YouTube were designed to addict kids](https://bsky.app/profile/tuta.com/post/3mhxkfowv322c)**

A Los Angeles court jury made a landmark ruling that social media platforms deliberately designed to addict children. This verdict could have far-reaching impacts on the social media industry. Platforms may face stricter regulations and legal liabilities.

**[A major hacking tool has leaked online, putting millions of iPhones at risk](https://www.patrick-breyer.de/en/end-of-chat-control-eu-parliament-stops-mass-surveillance-in-voting-thriller-paving-the-way-for-genuine-child-protection/)**

## 🧠 Health & Wellness

Scientific research found that vivid dreams may help achieve deeper and more restful sleep. There is an important connection between dream activity and sleep quality. This finding may change our understanding of the relationship between sleep and dreams.

**[High meat consumption may protect against cognitive decline in people with a specific Alzheimer's gene](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260325055441.htm)**

Research found that high meat consumption may help protect cognitive function in people carrying specific Alzheimer's genes. This finding challenges traditional dietary recommendations. Genotype may influence the choice of optimal dietary strategies.

**[Depression is linked to a genuine pessimistic bias rather than a realistic view of the world](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260325005920.htm)**

Research shows that people with depression exhibit genuine pessimistic bias rather than realistic perception of the world. This finding clarifies controversies about cognitive patterns in depression. Understanding this bias helps improve depression treatment methods.


---

- Adjust asset allocation amid inflation pressures
- Consider defensive investments against recession risks

**🧠 Health & Wellness**
- Value dream quality for better sleep health
- Personalize diet strategies based on genotype
- Identify and correct depression-related cognitive biases

# 📰 每日智识简报（中文）
### 2026年03月27日


## 📈 金融财经

**为什么对冲基金老将敦促投资者做最坏准备**

资深对冲基金经理警告投资者应为市场动荡做好准备。当前经济环境显示出潜在风险信号正在积累。专业投资者建议采取防御性投资策略以应对可能的市场下跌。

**私人信贷裂缝为华尔街银行回归开门**

私人信贷市场出现问题为传统华尔街银行创造了重新获得市场份额的机会。银行业与私人信贷机构之间的竞争正在加剧。市场格局的变化可能重新定义金融服务行业的权力平衡。

**市场预期美联储下一步可能加息**

由于通胀担忧加剧，市场现在预期美联储可能采取加息行动。投资者对货币政策转向更加鹰派的可能性做出反应。利率预期的变化正在影响各类资产的定价和投资决策。

**中国工业利润年初激增15%**

中国工业企业利润在年初实现了15%的强劲增长。然而油价冲击威胁着未来的经济前景和盈利能力。这一增长数据反映了中国制造业的韧性但也面临外部挑战。


## 📱 自媒体精选

**香港警方可根据新安全规定要求提供手机密码**

香港实施新的安全法规允许警方要求民众提供手机密码。这项政策引发了对个人隐私权和数字安全的广泛关注。新规定标志着香港在数字监管方面的重大政策转变。

**大卫·萨克斯结束人工智能沙皇职务**

大卫·萨克斯已经结束了人工智能沙皇的职务并转向新的工作方向。这一人事变动可能影响美国人工智能政策的发展方向。科技政策领域的领导层变化引起行业关注。

**维基百科严厉打击文章写作中的人工智能使用**

维基百科开始严格限制在文章编写过程中使用人工智能技术。这一政策旨在维护内容的原创性和准确性标准。该决定反映了对AI生成内容质量和可靠性的担忧。

**大多数美国人不担心人工智能末日**

最新研究显示大多数美国人对人工智能末日场景并不感到恐惧。公众对AI技术的态度比预期更加乐观和理性。这一发现挑战了关于AI恐慌普遍存在的假设。


## 🧠 健康·心理·美学

**生动梦境可能是更深层安眠的秘密**

科学研究发现生动的梦境可能有助于实现更深层次的休息性睡眠。梦境活动与睡眠质量之间存在重要的生理联系。这一发现为改善睡眠健康提供了新的科学视角。

**二甲双胍的隐藏大脑通路60年后被揭示**

科学家在二甲双胍使用60年后终于揭示了其影响大脑的隐藏通路机制。这一发现可能为神经系统疾病治疗开辟新的可能性。研究结果表明这种常见糖尿病药物具有更广泛的神经保护作用。

**科学家发现与帕金森病相关的细胞溢流阀**

研究人员发现了细胞中与帕金森病发病机制相关的溢流阀结构。这一发现有助于更好地理解神经退行性疾病的发生过程。新的细胞机制研究为帕金森病治疗提供了潜在突破点。

**大规模分析将社交媒体与青少年心理健康恶化联系**

大规模纵向数据分析显示社交媒体使用与青少年心理健康状况恶化存在关联。研究结果为家长和政策制定者提供了重要的科学依据。这一发现强调了数字健康管理对年轻人的重要性。


---
## 💡 今日洞察

**📈 投资建议**
- 关注防御性资产配置应对通胀风险
- 布局传统银行股把握私人信贷回调
- 警惕美联储加息对成长股的冲击

**🧠 健康建议**
- 重视睡眠质量改善从梦境入手
- 限制青少年社交媒体使用时间
- 关注二甲双胍的神经保护潜力

# 📰 Daily Intelligence Brief
### March 27, 2026


## 📈 Finance & Markets

**[Why one hedge fund veteran is urging investors to 'prepare for the worst'](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/27/iran-to-economic-risks-markets-ability-to-forecast-world-in-question.html)**

A seasoned hedge fund manager warns investors to prepare for potential market turbulence ahead. Current economic conditions show accumulating risk signals beneath the surface. Professional investors recommend adopting defensive investment strategies to weather possible market downturns.

**[Private credit's cracks open door for Wall Street banks' comeback](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/27/wall-street-banks-private-credit-market-share-leveraged-loans.html)**

Emerging issues in private credit markets create opportunities for traditional Wall Street banks to regain market share. Competition between banks and private credit firms is intensifying significantly. Shifting market dynamics may redefine the power balance in financial services industry.

**[Markets now see the Fed's next move as a potential rate hike](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/26/federal-reserve-kevin-walsh-elizabeth-warren-trump.html)**

Markets now anticipate potential Federal Reserve rate hikes due to mounting inflation concerns. Investors are reacting to possibilities of more hawkish monetary policy shifts ahead. Changing rate expectations are influencing asset pricing and investment decision-making processes.

**[China industrial profits surge 15% to start year](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/25/the-firm-whose-ai-paper-knocked-the-whole-market-is-out-with-another-big-call.html)**

Chinese industrial enterprise profits achieved strong 15% growth at the year's beginning. However, oil price shocks threaten future economic outlook and profitability prospects. This growth data reflects manufacturing resilience but faces external challenges ahead.


## 📱 Tech & Media

**[Hong Kong Police Can Now Demand Phone Passwords Under New Security Rules](https://www.gadgetreview.com/hong-kong-police-can-now-demand-phone-passwords-under-new-security-rules)**

Hong Kong implements new security regulations allowing police to demand phone passwords from citizens. This policy raises widespread concerns about personal privacy rights and digital security. The new rules mark a significant policy shift in Hong Kong's digital governance approach.

**[David Sacks is done as AI czar](https://sightlessscribbles.com/posts/the-paperwork-flood/)**

David Sacks has concluded his role as AI czar and is moving toward new endeavors. This personnel change may influence the direction of US artificial intelligence policy development. Leadership changes in tech policy areas are drawing industry attention and concern.

**[Wikipedia cracks down on the use of AI in article writing](https://xn--gckvb8fzb.com/hold-on-to-your-hardware/)**

Wikipedia begins strictly limiting the use of artificial intelligence technology in article writing processes. This policy aims to maintain content originality and accuracy standards throughout the platform. The decision reflects concerns about AI-generated content quality and reliability issues.

**[Most Americans don't fear an AI apocalypse](https://micahkepe.com/blog/jsongrep/)**

Latest research shows most Americans do not fear artificial intelligence apocalypse scenarios significantly. Public attitudes toward AI technology are more optimistic and rational than expected. This finding challenges assumptions about widespread AI panic among general populations.


## 🧠 Health & Wellness

**[Vivid dreams may be the secret to deeper, more restful sleep](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260326011458.htm)**

Scientific research discovers that vivid dreams may help achieve deeper and more restful sleep. Important physiological connections exist between dream activity and overall sleep quality measures. This finding provides new scientific perspectives for improving sleep health outcomes.

**[Metformin's hidden brain pathway revealed after 60 years](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260325055441.htm)**

Scientists finally reveal hidden brain pathway mechanisms of metformin after 60 years of use. This discovery may open new possibilities for neurological disease treatment and management. Research results indicate this common diabetes medication has broader neuroprotective effects than known.

**[Scientists discover overflow valve in cells linked to Parkinson's Disease](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260325005920.htm)**

Researchers discover cellular overflow valve structures linked to Parkinson's disease development mechanisms. This finding helps better understand the progression of neurodegenerative disease processes overall. New cellular mechanism research provides potential breakthrough points for Parkinson's treatment approaches.

**[Massive analysis links social media to poorer youth mental health](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260324230102.htm)**

Massive longitudinal data analysis shows social media use correlates with deteriorating youth mental health. Research results provide important scientific evidence for parents and policymakers to consider. This finding emphasizes the importance of digital health management for young people.


---
## 💡 Today's Insights

**📈 Investment**
- Focus defensive assets against inflation risks
- Position traditional banks amid private credit pullback
- Beware Fed hikes impact on growth stocks

**🧠 Health & Wellness**
- Prioritize sleep quality through dream enhancement
- Limit youth social media exposure time
- Explore metformin neuroprotective potential benefits

# 📰 每日智识简报（中文）
### 2026年03月28日


## 📈 金融财经

**股债双跌油价破百 2022年期货交易策略或再度获胜**

随着股市和债市双双下跌，油价突破100美元大关，市场波动加剧。2022年曾经表现出色的期货交易策略可能再次成为投资者的赢家选择。当前市场环境为期货交易提供了新的获利机会。

**对冲基金老将警告投资者做好最坏准备**

资深对冲基金经理警告投资者应当为最坏情况做好准备。当前经济环境存在多重不确定因素，可能导致市场出现重大调整。投资者需要重新评估投资组合风险并制定防御策略。

**私募信贷现裂痕 华尔街银行迎来复苏机会**

私募信贷市场开始显现裂痕，为传统华尔街银行重新获得市场份额创造了机会。银行与私募信贷机构之间的竞争才刚刚开始升温。这一变化可能重塑整个信贷市场格局。

**中国工业利润年初激增15% 但油价冲击威胁前景**

中国工业企业利润在年初实现15%的强劲增长，显示经济复苏势头良好。然而油价大幅上涨对未来前景构成威胁，可能影响制造业成本和盈利能力。投资者需要密切关注油价走势对中国经济的影响。


## 📱 自媒体精选

**2035年电网动力来源竞争白热化**

到2035年为电网提供动力的能源竞争异常激烈，各种技术路线都在争夺主导地位。传统能源与新能源技术都在加速发展和部署。未来电网的能源结构将决定整个社会的可持续发展方向。

**从月球酒店到放牧业 YC演示日8家热门初创企业**

在YC演示日上，从月球酒店到智能放牧等8家初创企业吸引了投资者的强烈关注。这些项目涵盖了从太空旅游到农业科技的广泛领域。投资者对创新科技项目的投资热情依然高涨。

**录音带揭示米尔格拉姆服从实验大规模违规**

新发现的录音带显示著名的米尔格拉姆服从实验存在大规模的违规操作。这一发现质疑了经典心理学实验的可靠性和科学性。学术界需要重新审视这些影响深远的实验结果。


## 🧠 健康·心理·美学

**科学家发现生病时食欲消失的原因**

科学家最新研究揭示了人体生病时食欲突然消失的生理机制。这一发现有助于理解免疫系统如何影响进食行为和新陈代谢。相关研究可能为治疗食欲不振和相关疾病提供新的思路。

**生动梦境可能是深度安眠的秘密**

最新研究表明生动的梦境可能是获得更深层次、更有恢复性睡眠的关键因素。这一发现改变了人们对梦境作用的传统认知。研究结果可能为改善睡眠质量提供新的科学依据。

**二甲双胍60年后揭示隐藏大脑通路**

经过60年的使用，科学家终于揭示了糖尿病药物二甲双胍在大脑中的隐藏作用机制。这一突破性发现可能为治疗神经退行性疾病开辟新的治疗途径。二甲双胍的多重健康益处正在被重新认识。

**创伤如何劫持大脑及EMDR疗法的帮助**

创伤会改变大脑的正常功能和结构，影响情绪调节和记忆处理能力。EMDR疗法通过特定的眼动技术帮助大脑重新处理创伤记忆。这种治疗方法为创伤后应激障碍患者提供了有效的康复途径。


---
## 💡 今日洞察

**📈 投资建议**
- 关注期货和能源板块投资机会
- 防御性配置应对市场波动风险
- 重点布局清洁能源和科技创新

**🧠 健康建议**
- 重视睡眠质量改善生活健康
- 了解药物多重作用机制效果
- 关注心理创伤的科学治疗方法

# 📰 Daily Intelligence Brief
### March 28, 2026


## 📈 Finance & Markets

**[As stocks and bonds fall, and oil hits $100, a futures trade that boomed in 2022 may again be a winner](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/28/market-correction-futures-hedging-strategies.html)**

Stock and bond markets are declining while oil prices surge past $100 per barrel. The futures trading strategies that performed well in 2022 may become profitable again. Current market volatility creates new opportunities for futures traders.

**[Why one hedge fund veteran is urging investors to 'prepare for the worst'](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/27/iran-to-economic-risks-markets-ability-to-forecast-world-in-question.html)**

A veteran hedge fund manager warns investors to prepare for worst-case scenarios. Multiple economic uncertainties could trigger significant market corrections. Investors should reassess portfolio risks and develop defensive strategies.

**[Private credit's cracks open door for Wall Street banks' comeback: 'The tug of war is just starting'](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/27/wall-street-banks-private-credit-market-share-leveraged-loans.html)**

Cracks in private credit markets create opportunities for traditional Wall Street banks to regain market share. Competition between banks and private credit firms is intensifying. This shift could reshape the entire credit market landscape.

**[China industrial profits surge 15% to start year, but oil price shock threatens outlook](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/26/federal-reserve-kevin-walsh-elizabeth-warren-trump.html)**

Chinese industrial profits surged 15% at the year's start, showing strong economic recovery momentum. However, soaring oil prices threaten future prospects and manufacturing profitability. Investors should monitor oil price impacts on China's economy closely.


## 📱 Tech & Media

**[What will power the grid in 2035? The race is wide open](https://2ndbreakfast.audreywatters.com/you-do-not-in-fact-have-to-hand-it-to-them/)**

The competition for powering electrical grids by 2035 is intensely competitive across multiple technologies. Both traditional and renewable energy sources are rapidly developing and deploying. Future grid energy mix will determine society's sustainable development direction.

**[From Moon hotels to cattle herding: 8 startups investors chased at YC Demo Day](https://computeradsfromthepast.substack.com/p/byte-interviews-chuck-peddle-father)**

Eight startups from moon hotels to smart cattle herding attracted strong investor attention at YC Demo Day. Projects span from space tourism to agricultural technology across diverse sectors. Investor enthusiasm for innovative tech projects remains high.

**[Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments](https://github.com/EnriqueLop/legalize-es)**

Newly discovered audio tapes reveal widespread rule-breaking in the famous Milgram obedience experiments. This discovery questions the reliability and scientific validity of classic psychology experiments. Academia needs to re-examine these influential experimental results.


## 🧠 Health & Wellness

**[Scientists discover why your appetite suddenly disappears when you're sick](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260328024519.htm)**

Scientists have revealed the physiological mechanism behind sudden appetite loss during illness. This discovery helps understand how the immune system affects eating behavior and metabolism. Research may provide new approaches for treating appetite disorders.

**[Vivid dreams may be the secret to deeper, more restful sleep](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260326011458.htm)**

New research suggests vivid dreams may be key to achieving deeper, more restorative sleep. This finding changes traditional understanding of dreams' role in sleep. Results may provide scientific basis for improving sleep quality.

**[Metformin's hidden brain pathway revealed after 60 years](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260325055441.htm)**

After 60 years of use, scientists have revealed metformin's hidden brain pathways and mechanisms. This breakthrough may open new therapeutic avenues for neurodegenerative diseases. Multiple health benefits of metformin are being newly recognized.

**[How Trauma Hijacks Your Brain (and How EMDR Can Help)](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260325005920.htm)**

Trauma alters normal brain function and structure, affecting emotional regulation and memory processing. EMDR therapy uses specific eye movement techniques to help reprocess traumatic memories. This treatment provides effective recovery pathways for PTSD patients.


---
## 💡 Today's Insights

**📈 Investment**
- Focus on futures and energy sector opportunities
- Adopt defensive positioning against market volatility
- Prioritize clean energy and tech innovation investments

**🧠 Health & Wellness**
- Prioritize sleep quality for better health outcomes
- Understand multiple drug mechanisms for better effects
- Consider scientific approaches for trauma treatment

# 📰 每日智识简报（中文）
### 2026年03月29日


## 📈 金融财经

**股债双跌油价破百，2022年期货交易策略或再次获胜**

随着股票和债券市场下跌，石油价格突破100美元关口，市场波动加剧。2022年表现优异的期货交易策略可能再次成为投资者的避风港。这种策略在市场动荡时期通常能够提供更好的风险对冲和收益机会。

**对冲基金资深人士敦促投资者为最坏情况做准备**

一位经验丰富的对冲基金专家警告投资者应该为市场最坏的情况做好准备。当前经济环境充满不确定性，包括通胀压力、地缘政治风险等多重挑战。专家建议投资者采取更加谨慎的投资策略和风险管理措施。

**私人信贷出现裂痕为华尔街银行复苏开门**

私人信贷市场开始显露问题，为传统华尔街银行重新获得市场份额创造了机会。银行与私人信贷机构之间的竞争正在加剧，这场角力才刚刚开始。市场格局的变化可能重塑金融服务行业的未来发展。

**中国工业利润年初激增15%但油价冲击威胁前景**

中国今年开局工业企业利润实现15%的强劲增长，显示经济复苏势头良好。然而，油价大幅上涨带来的成本压力可能对未来前景构成威胁。这种矛盾局面反映了当前全球经济环境的复杂性和不确定性。

**比特币价格将下跌？投资者从ETF撤资1.71亿美元**

投资者从比特币ETF中撤出1.71亿美元资金，创下数周来最大资金流出规模。这一现象引发市场对比特币价格可能下跌的担忧和讨论。大规模资金流出通常预示着投资者信心的变化和市场情绪的转向。


## 📱 自媒体精选

**TSA排队失控旅客雇佣代排队服务**

美国机场安检排队情况严重失控，旅客开始雇佣专业代排队人员来节省时间。这种现象反映了航空旅行系统面临的巨大压力和效率问题。代排队服务的兴起也显示了人们对时间价值的重新认识。

**扎克伯格发短信给马斯克提供DOGE帮助**

Meta首席执行官马克·扎克伯格主动联系埃隆·马斯克，表示愿意为政府效率部门提供帮助。这一举动显示了科技巨头之间在政府合作项目上的潜在协作意愿。两位科技领袖的互动可能对未来政府数字化改革产生重要影响。

**斯坦福研究揭示向AI聊天机器人寻求个人建议的危险**

斯坦福大学最新研究详细阐述了向AI聊天机器人寻求个人建议可能带来的各种风险。研究指出AI在处理复杂个人问题时存在局限性，可能提供不当或有害建议。这项研究为AI技术的安全使用提供了重要警示和指导。


## 🧠 健康·心理·美学

**青少年饮食对心理健康影响超出预期**

最新研究发现青少年的饮食习惯对其心理健康的影响程度远超过此前的认知。不良饮食模式与青少年抑郁、焦虑等心理问题存在密切关联。这一发现强调了营养教育和健康饮食在青少年心理健康维护中的重要作用。

**新疗法无需阿片类药物即可消除疼痛且无成瘾性**

科学家开发出一种革命性的疼痛治疗方法，能够有效缓解疼痛而无需使用阿片类药物。这种新疗法避免了传统止痛药的成瘾风险，为慢性疼痛患者提供了更安全的选择。该技术的突破可能彻底改变疼痛管理领域的治疗模式。

**每日限制社交媒体一小时可减少困扰个体孤独感**

研究表明，将社交媒体使用时间限制在每天一小时内能够显著减少心理困扰人群的孤独感。过度使用社交媒体与孤独感和心理健康问题存在关联。适度控制社交媒体使用时间对改善心理健康具有积极意义。

**哭泣真的让人感觉更好吗？新心理学研究显示取决于关键因素**

最新心理学研究揭示了哭泣是否能改善情绪取决于特定的关键因素。并非所有的哭泣都能带来情绪缓解，其效果受到环境、原因和个人特征等多重因素影响。这项研究为理解情绪调节机制提供了新的科学视角。


---
## 💡 今日洞察

**📈 投资建议**
- 关注期货交易策略应对市场波动
- 谨慎投资加强风险管理措施
- 关注银行股受益私人信贷调整

**🧠 健康建议**
- 青少年需重视饮食与心理健康关联
- 限制社交媒体使用改善心理状态
- 探索非阿片类疼痛管理新方法

# 📰 Daily Intelligence Brief
### March 29, 2026


## 📈 Finance & Markets

**[As stocks and bonds fall, and oil hits $100, a futures trade that boomed in 2022 may again be a winner](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/28/market-correction-futures-hedging-strategies.html)**

Stock and bond markets are declining while oil prices surge past $100, creating market volatility. The futures trading strategy that performed well in 2022 may once again become attractive to investors. This approach typically offers better risk hedging and profit opportunities during turbulent market periods.

**[Why one hedge fund veteran is urging investors to 'prepare for the worst'](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/27/iran-to-economic-risks-markets-ability-to-forecast-world-in-question.html)**

An experienced hedge fund expert warns investors to prepare for worst-case market scenarios. Current economic environment faces multiple uncertainties including inflation pressures and geopolitical risks. The expert recommends adopting more cautious investment strategies and enhanced risk management measures.

**[Private credit's cracks open door for Wall Street banks' comeback](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/27/wall-street-banks-private-credit-market-share-leveraged-loans.html)**

Cracks in the private credit market are creating opportunities for traditional Wall Street banks to regain market share. Competition between banks and private credit firms is intensifying, with the battle just beginning. These market shifts may reshape the future of the financial services industry.

**[China industrial profits surge 15% to start year, but oil price shock threatens outlook](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/26/federal-reserve-kevin-walsh-elizabeth-warren-trump.html)**

China's industrial profits surged 15% at the year's start, showing strong economic recovery momentum. However, rising oil prices create cost pressures that may threaten future outlook. This contradictory situation reflects the complexity and uncertainty of current global economic conditions.

**[Bitcoin Price Drop Coming? Investors Pull $171M From ETFs in Biggest Outflow in Weeks](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/28/oil-doordash-lyft-usps-united.html)**

Investors withdrew $171 million from Bitcoin ETFs, marking the largest outflow in weeks. This phenomenon raises concerns and discussions about potential Bitcoin price declines. Large-scale capital outflows typically indicate changing investor confidence and shifting market sentiment.


## 📱 Tech & Media

**[TSA lines are so out of control that travelers are hiring line-sitters](https://www.washingtonpost.com/travel/2026/03/28/tsa-line-sitters/)**

TSA security lines at US airports are severely out of control, leading travelers to hire professional line-sitters. This phenomenon reflects enormous pressure and efficiency issues in the aviation travel system. The rise of line-sitting services also shows people's renewed appreciation for time value.

**[Mark Zuckerberg texted Elon Musk to offer help with DOGE](https://www.bbc.com/culture/article/20221101-the-cloud-the-nuclear-novel-that-shaped-germany)**

Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg proactively contacted Elon Musk offering assistance with the Department of Government Efficiency. This move shows potential collaboration willingness among tech giants on government projects. The interaction between these tech leaders may significantly impact future government digitalization reforms.

**[Stanford study outlines dangers of asking AI chatbots for personal advice](https://sheetninja.io)**

A new Stanford study details various risks of seeking personal advice from AI chatbots. The research highlights AI limitations in handling complex personal issues, potentially providing inappropriate or harmful advice. This study provides important warnings and guidance for safe AI technology usage.


## 🧠 Health & Wellness

**[What teens eat could be affecting their mental health more than we thought](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260328043602.htm)**

New research reveals teenage dietary habits affect mental health far more than previously understood. Poor eating patterns are closely linked to depression, anxiety and other psychological issues in adolescents. This finding emphasizes the importance of nutrition education and healthy eating in maintaining teenage mental health.

**[This new therapy turns off pain without opioids or addiction](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260328043558.htm)**

Scientists developed a revolutionary pain treatment method that effectively relieves pain without opioids. This new therapy avoids addiction risks of traditional painkillers, offering safer options for chronic pain patients. This technological breakthrough may completely transform treatment approaches in pain management.

**[Limiting social media to one hour a day reduces loneliness in distressed individuals](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260328043556.htm)**

Research shows limiting social media use to one hour daily significantly reduces loneliness in psychologically distressed individuals. Excessive social media use is linked to loneliness and mental health issues. Moderately controlling social media usage time has positive implications for improving mental health.

**[Does crying actually make you feel better? New psychology research shows it depends on a key factor](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260328024519.htm)**

New psychology research reveals whether crying improves mood depends on specific key factors. Not all crying brings emotional relief, with effects influenced by environment, causes and personal characteristics. This research provides new scientific perspectives for understanding emotional regulation mechanisms.


---
## 💡 Today's Insights

**📈 Investment**
- Focus on futures strategies amid volatility
- Adopt cautious approach with risk management
- Consider banks benefiting from credit shifts

**🧠 Health & Wellness**
- Prioritize teen nutrition for mental health
- Limit social media to reduce loneliness
- Explore non-opioid pain management options

一位对冲基金资深专家建议投资者为最坏情况做好准备。当前经济环境充满不确定性，包括通胀上升和地缘政治紧张局势。该专家认为投资者应该采取更加保守和防御性的投资策略。

**私人信贷裂缝为华尔街银行复苏开门**

私人信贷市场出现裂缝，为传统华尔街银行提供了重新获得市场份额的机会。银行业与私人信贷机构之间的竞争正在加剧。这种变化可能重塑整个信贷市场格局。

**通胀担忧加剧，市场预期美联储下步或加息**

随着通胀担忧的加剧，市场现在预期美联储的下一步行动可能是加息。这与此前的降息预期形成鲜明对比。投资者正在重新评估货币政策走向对资产价格的影响。


## 📱 自媒体精选

**展示项目：Phantom开源AI代理可在虚拟机中重写配置**

Phantom是一个开源AI代理项目，能够在自己的虚拟机中运行并重写配置文件。这种创新设计允许AI系统具有更强的自主性和适应性。该项目展示了AI代理技术的最新发展方向。

**AI芯片初创公司Rebellions IPO前融资4亿美元估值23亿**

AI芯片初创公司Rebellions在IPO前轮融资中筹集了4亿美元，估值达到23亿美元。这反映了投资者对AI芯片市场的强烈信心。公司将利用这笔资金加速产品开发和市场扩张。

**Mistral AI举债8.3亿美元在巴黎附近建数据中心**

法国AI公司Mistral AI通过债务融资筹集了8.3亿美元，用于在巴黎附近建设数据中心。这一投资将增强公司的计算能力和服务能力。欧洲AI基础设施建设正在加速发展。


## 🧠 健康·心理·美学

**仅需几分钟运动即可降低8种重大疾病风险**

研究显示，每天仅需几分钟的体力活动就能显著降低8种主要疾病的风险。这些疾病包括心脏病、糖尿病和某些癌症。即使是轻微的日常活动也能带来显著的健康益处。

**青少年饮食对心理健康影响超乎想象**

新研究表明，青少年的饮食习惯对其心理健康的影响可能比我们之前认为的更为重要。不良的饮食模式与抑郁、焦虑等心理问题存在密切关联。营养干预可能成为改善青少年心理健康的重要途径。

**新疗法可无药物成瘾风险地关闭疼痛**

科学家开发出一种新的疼痛治疗方法，能够在不使用阿片类药物的情况下有效缓解疼痛。这种疗法避免了成瘾风险，为慢性疼痛患者提供了新的治疗选择。该技术可能革命性地改变疼痛管理领域。

**常见除草剂草甘膦或通过破坏肠道菌群引发焦虑**

研究发现，广泛使用的除草剂草甘膦可能通过破坏肠道微生物群来诱发焦虑症状。这一发现揭示了环境化学物质与心理健康之间的新联系。肠道菌群健康对整体身心健康的重要性再次得到证实。


---
## 💡 今日洞察

**📈 投资建议**
- 关注期货和能源板块投资机会
- 防御性策略应对通胀和加息预期
- 重点布局AI芯片和基础设施领域

**🧠 健康建议**
- 每天几分钟运动预防重大疾病
- 青少年需重视饮食心理健康关联
- 选择有机食品减少化学物质摄入
news.en:
# 📰 Daily Intelligence Brief
### March 30, 2026


## 📈 Finance & Markets

**[Watch Fed Chair Jerome Powell speak live to an economics class at Harvard](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/30/watch-fed-chair-jerome-powell-speak-live-to-an-economics-class-at-harvard.html)**

Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell will speak live to an economics class at Harvard University. This speech will provide important policy signals for investors and the economics community. Markets are closely watching for his views on current economic conditions and monetary policy.

**[As stocks and bonds fall, and oil hits $100, a futures trade that boomed in 2022 may again be a winner](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/28/market-correction-futures-hedging-strategies.html)**

With stocks and bonds falling and oil reaching $100, certain futures trading strategies are gaining renewed attention. These strategies performed well in 2022 and current market conditions may again provide profit opportunities. Investors are beginning to reallocate portfolios to address inflationary pressures.

**[Why one hedge fund veteran is urging investors to prepare for the worst](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/27/iran-to-economic-risks-markets-ability-to-forecast-world-in-question.html)**

A hedge fund veteran is advising investors to prepare for worst-case scenarios. The current economic environment is filled with uncertainty, including rising inflation and geopolitical tensions. The expert believes investors should adopt more conservative and defensive investment strategies.

**[Private credits cracks open door for Wall Street banks comeback](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/27/wall-street-banks-private-credit-market-share-leveraged-loans.html)**

Cracks in the private credit market are providing traditional Wall Street banks with opportunities to regain market share. Competition between banks and private credit institutions is intensifying. This shift could reshape the entire credit market landscape.

**[Markets now see the Feds next move as a potential rate hike as inflation fears mount](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/28/oil-doordash-lyft-usps-united.html)**

As inflation concerns intensify, markets now expect the Feds next move could be a rate hike. This contrasts sharply with previous expectations of rate cuts. Investors are reassessing the impact of monetary policy direction on asset prices.


## 📱 Tech & Media

**[Show HN: Phantom - Open-source AI agent on its own VM that rewrites its config](https://github.com/ghostwright/phantom)**

Phantom is an open-source AI agent project that can run in its own virtual machine and rewrite configuration files. This innovative design allows AI systems to have greater autonomy and adaptability. The project demonstrates the latest developments in AI agent technology.

**[AI chip startup Rebellions raises $400 million at $2.3B valuation in pre-IPO round](https://nbailey.ca/post/router/)**

AI chip startup Rebellions raised $400 million in a pre-IPO round at a $2.3 billion valuation. This reflects strong investor confidence in the AI chip market. The company will use the funds to accelerate product development and market expansion.

**[Mistral AI raises $830M in debt to set up a data center near Paris](https://www.dhanishsemar.com/writing/bird-brains)**

French AI company Mistral AI raised $830 million in debt financing to build a data center near Paris. This investment will enhance the companys computing and service capabilities. European AI infrastructure development is accelerating.


## 🧠 Health & Wellness

**[Just a few minutes of effort could lower your risk of 8 major diseases](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260330001126.htm)**

Research shows that just a few minutes of daily physical activity can significantly reduce the risk of 8 major diseases. These diseases include heart disease, diabetes, and certain cancers. Even light daily activities can provide significant health benefits.

**[What teens eat could be affecting their mental health more than we thought](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260328043602.htm)**

New research suggests that teenagers dietary habits may have a greater impact on mental health than previously thought. Poor dietary patterns are closely linked to psychological issues like depression and anxiety. Nutritional interventions could be important pathways for improving adolescent mental health.

**[This new therapy turns off pain without opioids or addiction](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260328043558.htm)**

Scientists have developed a new pain treatment method that effectively relieves pain without using opioid medications. This therapy avoids addiction risks and provides new treatment options for chronic pain patients. The technology could revolutionize the field of pain management.

**[Glyphosate: A common weedkiller may induce anxiety by disrupting gut bacteria](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260328043556.htm)**

Research found that the widely used herbicide glyphosate may induce anxiety symptoms by disrupting gut microbiota. This finding reveals new connections between environmental chemicals and mental health. The importance of gut microbiome health for overall physical and mental wellbeing is confirmed again.


---
## 💡 Today's Insights

**📈 Investment**
- Focus on futures and energy sector opportunities
- Adopt defensive strategies for inflation expectations
- Invest in AI chips and infrastructure

**🧠 Health & Wellness**
- Exercise few minutes daily prevents major diseases
- Teens need better diet for mental health
- Choose organic foods reduce chemical exposure

# 📰 每日智识简报（中文）
### 2026年03月31日


## 📈 金融财经

**巴菲特称过早抛售苹果股票，虽然在当前市场不会增持**

巴菲特承认过早出售苹果股票是错误决定。他表示在合适的价格下仍愿意增持苹果。但在当前市场环境下不会立即行动。

**霍尔木兹海峡封锁导致中国供应商警告美国商品涨价**

霍尔木兹海峡关闭影响全球供应链。中国供应商警告运输成本上升将推高商品价格。美国消费者将面临更高的进口商品成本。

**通胀担忧加剧，市场预期美联储下步或将加息**

通胀压力重新抬头引发市场担忧。投资者开始预期美联储可能改变货币政策方向。下一步行动可能是加息而非降息。


## 📱 自媒体精选

**没有人会来拯救你的职业生涯**

个人职业发展需要主动规划和自我驱动。依赖他人或公司来规划职业道路是不现实的。成功的关键在于自我投资和持续学习。

**Meta推出两款专为处方镜用户设计的雷朋智能眼镜**

Meta扩展智能眼镜产品线以服务处方镜用户。新产品结合时尚设计与先进技术功能。这标志着可穿戴设备市场的进一步细分。

**Instagram测试付费匿名查看故事功能**

Instagram正在测试新的付费隐私功能。用户可以付费匿名浏览他人的故事内容。这反映了社交媒体平台对隐私需求的商业化探索。


## 🧠 健康·心理·美学

**科学家发现睡眠开关可增肌减脂并提升脑力**

研究人员发现了控制睡眠质量的关键机制。良好的睡眠可以同时促进肌肉生长和脂肪燃烧。这一发现为改善整体健康提供了新途径。

**[Markets now see the Fed's next move as a potential rate hike as inflation fears mount](https://www.cnbc.com/2026/03/31/huawei-annual-report-2025-cloud-computing-revenue.html)**

**[Nobody Is Coming to Save Your Career](https://alifeengineered.substack.com/p/nobody-is-coming-to-save-your-career)**

Studies show short bursts of physical activity have significant health benefits. Just minutes of daily exercise can prevent multiple chronic diseases. This provides busy people with simple, actionable health solutions.

**[This new therapy turns off pain without opioids or addiction](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/03/260328043602.htm)**

Scientists developed pain treatment methods not relying on opioid medications. New therapy effectively relieves pain without addiction risks involved. This provides safer options for chronic pain patients.


---

- Focus on inflation hedge asset allocation opportunities
- Consider supply chain disruption investment risks carefully
- Position in AI and health technology innovation

**🧠 Health & Wellness**
- Optimize sleep quality for better overall health
- Daily short exercises prevent chronic diseases effectively
- Monitor diet impact on teenage mental health
